case_title: BRAD PAUL STUDEBAKER VS. DOREEN HOROWITZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY STUDEBAKER, BRAD PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT HOROWITZ, DOREEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-17-2012 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED JUL-30-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOROWITZ, DOREEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-17-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-17-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STUDEBAKER, BRAD PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOROWITZ, DOREEN $1,205.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,205.00, DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE A CREDIT ON THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $48.00 WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-07-2012 - JUDGMENT ENTERED.
